title: nepeta yanthina
intro: Nepeta yanthina, also known as Yellow Catmint, is a perennial plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Nepeta yanthina include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Nepeta yanthina is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
